title: fix: no starting tier balance for new users
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- New users no longer receive a signup Pollen grant â€” consistent with retiring the free hourly drip.
- `onAfterUserCreate` stops writing `tier_balance`/`last_tier_grant`; column stays NULL (coalesced to 0 by the balance gate in `generation-access.ts`).
- Keeps the `user_registration` Tinybird event; `pollen_amount` now 0.
- Drops the now-unused `getTierPollen` import.

Balance now comes only from quests or purchases. New users get a 402 on first generation until they have balance â€” intended.

gist.headline: The quest begins at zero
gist.blurb: We've streamlined onboarding so new users dive straight into Quests to earn their first Pollen.
gist.summary: New user accounts now start with a 0 Pollen balance instead of an initial grant, fully transitioning the platform to a Quest-based earning model.
gist.impact: New users will receive a 402 status on their first generation request until they complete an onboarding Quest or purchase a Pollen pack.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot standing in front of a wooden Quest Board. The empty starting state is represented by an empty honey jar, but the focus is on the exciting quest board to earn the first drops.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky CRT monitor robot looking excitedly at a wooden Quest Board. The bee holds a small empty glass jar, ready to fill it. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
